notices.title: Diwali Holiday Notice
notices.content: School will remain closed from October 30 to November 3 on account of Diwali festival. Wishing all students a safe and happy festival of lights.

notices.title: Annual Sports Meet 2024
notices.content: The Annual Sports Meet is scheduled for November 15-16. Registrations for track and field events are now open.

notices.title: Unit Test - II Schedule
notices.content: Unit Test 2 will commence from December 5th. Detailed timetable has been uploaded in the student portal.
